3305330.name: Amozon Extraplanetary Colonization Program
3305330.description:
Are you tired of living the same monotonous life on some lame faraway colony? Do you ever wish your had life more purpose beyond surviving to another day? Want to make loads of money?

Your next opportunity starts here.

Sign up and join:

Here, you are always a valued Partner!

With our state-of-the-art self-renewing contracts, we'll always have your back. Partners are eligible for all employment benefits as long as a menial work quota is maintained.

Explore and claim distant worlds!

At the Amozon Extraplanetary Colonization Program, employees get full autonomy! Once you land on your planet, that world is your own! Run your business YOUR way, no need to listen to others on how it's done.

Extract Resources any way you like!

With a wide array of different machinery and upgrades, you always have different methods of producing resources from your planet.

Get paid.

Sell your materials for money and earn unbelievable profits. Use your earned cash to reinvest, and grow your production further!

Amozon Extraplanetary Colonization Program is a game I'm developing for my senior thesis. It is meant to be a roguelike take on the factory builder genre. You might be asking how it works to be roguelike? Well, there is no crafting for one. Instead, you earn money by completing contracts, and spend money to buy your block from a shop, earning more offers as you go. Each contract is a request to produce a certain amount of 2-4 different materials, with early contracts just asking for raw materials, but later contracts requiring complex components with more involved crafting methods. The game is still in development and is in early access.

Features:

  • 4 unique playable character

  • over 45 unique blocks and factory components

  • 60+ items to collect or sell

  • A procedurally generated world that keeps each run unique

  • A randomly generated shop with multiple tiers of offers that provides you with new building blocks for your ever growing factory
3305330.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
